// EXAMPLE CRON JOBS: Shows model tiering and lightContext patterns

jobs.// rationale: Briefings are 90% data retrieval, 10% formatting. Haiku is great at this.
jobs.name: Morning Briefing

payload.message: Run the morning briefing pipeline: lobster run morning-briefing.lobster
Run the evening digest pipeline: lobster run evening-digest.lobster

jobs.// rationale: Health checks just run scripts and report results. Cheapest model.
jobs.name: Health Check

payload.message: Run the health check script and report any issues.

jobs.// rationale: Backup is a shell script. No LLM needed.
jobs.// caveat: exec does NOT work with sessionTarget: isolated — use launchd/cron instead
jobs.name: Nightly Backup

jobs.// rationale: Needs full agent context for classification rules in AGENTS.md
jobs.name: Email Scan

payload.message: Scan inbox for new emails and classify them.
